statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

articles.headline: Gabby Williams scores 16 points, Kaila Charles comes off bench for 13, Valkyries top Sparks 78-58
articles.description: — Gabby Williams scored 16 points, Kaila Charles came of the bench to finish with 13 points, eight rebounds and five assists, and the Golden State Valkyries beat the Los Angeles Sparks 78-58 on Monday night for their third straight win.

articles.headline: Arike Ogunbowale scores 22 points and hits 5 3-pointers in the Wings' 96-66 victory over the Aces
articles.description: — Arike Ogunbowale scored 22 points and made five 3-pointers, Jessica Shepard had 15 points, 15 rebounds and nine assists, and the Dallas Wings beat the Las Vegas Aces 96-66 on Monday night for their fifth straight win at home.

images.name: Dallas Wings vs. Las Vegas Aces - Game Highlights
images.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from Dallas Wings vs. Las Vegas Aces, 06/15/2026

articles.headline: Lynx douse the Fire 107-74 with 7 players in double-figure scoring and a big game by Nia Coffey
articles.description: — Natasha Howard had 18 points to lead seven players in double-figure scoring for the Minnesota Lynx in a 107-74 victory over the Portland Fire on Monday, fueled by 26 points off 22 turnovers.

articles.headline: Fantasy women's hoops: Free-agent targets for the uneven week ahead
articles.description: Tips to navigate a schedule shakeup and four players to add with the WNBA Commissioner's Cup in full swing this week.

images.name: Leila Lacan [608x342]
images.caption: Leila Lacan hasn't shown much rust after missing the start of the WNBA season while fulfilling an overseas obligation.

images.name: Sarah Ashlee Barker [1296x729]
images.caption: Sarah Ashlee Barker of the Portland Fire played a season-high 30 minutes on Thursday.

images.name: Angel Reese [1296x729]
images.caption: Angel Reese of the Atlanta Dream is one of the top 10 fantasy point scorers.

images.name: Olivia Miles Azzi Fudd [1296x729]
images.caption: No. 2 WNBA Draft pick Olivia Miles (right) drives against No. 1 pick Azzi Fudd (left).

articles.headline: How the Wings went from forgettable WNBA franchise to title contender
articles.description: Mired in mediocrity for much of its history, Dallas' retooled roster and new coach are ready to become WNBA contenders.

images.name: Paige Bueckers [1296x729]
images.caption: Paige Bueckers is averaging 19.8 points and 5.8 assists but is day-to-day because of a right ankle injury and missed Saturday's loss at Portland.

images.name: Curt Miller, Greg Bibb, Azzi Fudd, Jose Fernandez [1296x729]
images.caption: Curt Miller, Greg Bibb and Jose Fernandez welcomed Azzi Fudd to Dallas in April. One of the Wings owners, Bibb emphasized there's still a place for non-NBA-affiliated owners in the WNBA. He said there is no desire to sell or to add to the ownership group.

images.name: Arike Ogunbowale [1296x729]
images.caption: Arike Ogunbowale, the Wings' former 2019 first-round draft pick, is a four-time All-Star and Dallas' longest-tenured player.

images.name: Dallas Wings [1296x729]
images.caption: Paige Buecker (5) and Arike Ogwunowale (24) were the returning cornerstones this season for Dallas, which signed free agents Alanna Smith (8) and Jessica Shepard (32) and drafted Azzi Fudd with the No. 1 pick.

images.name: Jessica Shepard [1296x729]
images.caption: Jessica Shepard (13.6 PPG, 11.3 RPG, 5.5 APG) has the only triple-doubles (two) in the WNBA this season, and is averaging five more points, four more rebounds and three more assists than she did for the Lynx in 2025.

images.name: Dallas Wings vs. Phoenix Mercury - Game Highlights
images.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from Dallas Wings vs. Phoenix Mercury, 06/11/2026

articles.headline: Angel Reese has 15 points and 17 rebounds, including 11 offensive, and Dream beat Tempo 102-77
articles.description: — Angel Reese had 15 points and 17 rebounds — which included a career-high 11 offensive, one short of tying the WNBA single-game record — and the Atlanta Dream beat the Toronto Tempo 102-77 on Sunday.

images.name: Toronto Tempo vs. Atlanta Dream - Game Highlights
images.caption: Watch the Game Highlights from Toronto Tempo vs. Atlanta Dream, 06/14/2026

article.headline: Maya Caldwell leads balanced Lynx to 100-72 rout of expansion Tempo
article.description: — Reserve Maya Caldwell led a balanced attack with 16 points and the Minnesota Lynx beat the Toronto Tempo 100-72 on Thursday night.
article.linkText: Maya Caldwell leads balanced Lynx to 100-72 rout of expansion Tempo

article.story: MINNEAPOLIS -- — Reserve Maya Caldwell led a balanced attack with 16 points and the Minnesota Lynx beat the Toronto Tempo 100-72 on Thursday night. It was the worst loss for the expansion Tempo, who fell to 3-3 after winning their previous two. Toronto's other two losses were by three and four points. Minnesota's first four games were decided by a total of 16 points. Courtney Williams scored 15 points, rookie Olivia Miles had 14 and Natasha Howard and Kayla McBride each had 13 for the Lynx (3-2). Kia Nurse led Toronto with 23 points off the bench and rookie Kiki Rice added 11. Brittney Sykes and Marina Mabrey, who combine for more than 45 points a game — both reached 30 in a win over Phoenix on Sunday — were held to nine. Each picked up a pair of fouls in the first quarter. The Lynx shot 55%, had a 46-25 rebounding advantage and outscored the Tempo 42-24 in the paint. Minnesota went 10 of 24 behind the arc. The Tempo shot 34%. They made 12 3-pointers but only shot 29% from distance. The Lynx went on a 9-0 run and raced to a 27-14 lead after one quarter. Not much changed in the second quarter and the Lynx led 53-32 at halftime. The Lynx stretched the lead to 76-50 after three quarters. Up next Tempo: Host fellow expansion team Portland on Saturday. Lynx: At Chicago on Saturday. ------ AP WNBA: https://apnews.com/hub/wnba-basketball
